title: Acid Box Presents Super Fuzz
description: Acid Box & Abyss link up once again to unleash SUPER FUZZ at Caravanserai. Returning for more chaos, Brighton’s masters of parties and beverages collide for a night of big sounds and the best beer in town. The lineup is still under wraps, but you already know it’s going to go off. Pay What You Can 18+ only [after 9PM] Notice to ticket holders: Super Fuzz is opening its doors from 4pm, with live music from 5pm until 10.45pm. Please note that entry is subject to capacity at time of arrival; we advise getting down early! Tickets will only guarantee entry from 4pm-7pm after that, we will allow general admission until we are at our capacity of 300. As this event is now sold out, if you no longer intend on attending or do not want to risk being denied entry for arrivals post 7pm, please return your ticket by contacting the box office: you will be able to claim a refund.

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
